description: Style NoteThe understated and updated design details, fresh from sepia's design studio, makes this top the season's summer essential. Style this with form fitting jeggings and ballet flats for a sweet, girly vibe. For a vintage feel throw on a faded and worn denim jacket, jeans and a floral scarf.Product DetailsBlue sleeveless top, has a round neck, looped detail at back neck, white butterfly print on front and ruching at lower sidesMaterial and CareViscose blendGentle hand wash using mild detergentDo not scrub or bleachDry inside outCool iron; do not iron on decorationsSize and FitRegular fitThe model (height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing a size M
